defs: (bound form) of or by the wife, as opposed to a concubine (contrasted with 庶[shu4])
handed down in a direct line from the founder
born of the wife (i.e. not of a concubine)
having the same paternal grandfather but different father
son, esp. the eldest son, of the wife (contrasted with 庶子[shu4 zi3])
father's wife (term used by the children of a concubine to address their father's primary wife)
school or faction passing on faithfully one's doctrine
